title: Melania and Barron vote by mail, despite Donald Trump trying to restrict it
shortDescription: The president wants Congress to ban most mail-in voting. But his wife and their son, Barron, like Trump, voted by mail in a special Tuesday election.

title: Could CA Democrats miss general election? Poll has Republicans ahead
shortDescription: Conservative commentator Steve Hilton and Riverside County Sheriff Chad Bianco lead among likely voters, with Democratic candidates trailing.

title: Melania Trump joins a robot (yes, a robot) at White House
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump, a former fashion model, strutted into a White House summit alongside a humanoid robot.

title: The art of the Barron Trump deal unlocked in tea venture
shortDescription: Barron Trump is listed as a director of a new company that will market yerba mate, a popular South American tea that is winning fans worldwide.

title: Trump prepared to 'unleash hell,' says White House
shortDescription: White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt told reporters President Donald Trump "does not bluff" and is prepared to "unleash hell" against Iran.

title: Democrats win in Trump's 'backyard.' Is it a sign of midterm momentum?
shortDescription: "If Democrats can win in Trump’s backyard, we sure as hell can win anywhere across the country," DNC Chair Ken Martin said on social media.

title: What did Iran give Trump? He called the gift a 'very nice thing'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has touted progress in talks with Iran, and even said Iran sent a gift to the U.S. But Iran rejected the 15-point peace plan.

title: Georgia bill brings fines, jail time against protestors blocking roads
shortDescription: A bill passed in the legislature and heading to the Georgia governor brings harsher penalties including jail time against protestors who block streets

title: Daily Briefing: Trump sinks to record low approval
shortDescription: New poll shows dip in Americans' support amid strikes in Iran. Here is the news to know on Wednesday.

title: Trump prepared to 'unleash hell' on Iran if negotiations fail, WH says
shortDescription: A source with knowledge of the matter described the U.S. peace plan as demands Iran must meet in order to end the war.

title: GOP loses House seat in Trump's district. What does it mean?
shortDescription: Emily Gregory defeated Trump-endorsed rival John Maples by just over 2 percentage points in a contest that drew 33,429 voters.

title: Trump's approval rating drops to record low because of Iran war
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's approval rating dropped to 36%, its lowest level since his return to the White House, according to a new Reuters/Ipsos poll.

title: With shutdown deal in sight, Dems say no-go without ICE reforms
shortDescription: Senate Democrats are cautiously optimistic about a potential agreement to fund the Department of Homeland Security. But it's far from a done deal.

title: Delta suspends special perks for members of Congress
shortDescription: As the partial government shutdown continues, Delta Air Lines said on March 24 that it was suspending special services for members of Congress.
